title: Formula giving number of days is negative
excerpt:
Hi so i am using the days formula found in the documentation but the date is giving a negative number. How do i remove this? 
ROUND(DAYS({Due Date},TODAY()),0) 
Thanks in advance!

posts.author: EckoNode (Jermine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi so i am using the days formula found in the documentation but the date is giving a negative number. How do i remove this?

ROUND(DAYS({Due Date},TODAY()),0)

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @EckoNode

Invert the order of your 2 dates…

DAYS(TODAY(),{Due Date})
